summary: Iteration 52: Unified PIN verification fix VERIFIED AND WORKING. All 9 key tests PASSED. The _resolve_pin() function now correctly checks manager_pin (plain text) in addition to system admin_pin (bcrypt), TOTP, and auditor PIN. Public verify endpoint also updates receipt_review_status so phone verification is reflected on desktop.

feature_verification.POST /api/verify/public/{type}/{id} with: PASS - Returns 400 'Invalid PIN — not recognized as admin PIN, TOTP, or auditor PIN'
feature_verification.POST /api/purchase-orders/{id}/mark-revi: PASS - Returns 200 'PO PO-XXX receipts marked as reviewed'
feature_verification.POST /api/uploads/mark-reviewed/branch_t: SKIPPED - No branch transfers available in test data
feature_verification.Public verify sets receipt_review_status: PASS - PO verified=True, receipt_review_status='reviewed' after public verify
feature_verification.Frontend ViewReceiptsPage uses /api/veri: VERIFIED - Line 72 correctly calls public endpoint

bug_fixes_verified.issue: Manager PIN (521325) not working on phone for verifying transactions
bug_fixes_verified.root_cause: _resolve_pin() only checked system_settings.admin_pin (bcrypt hash) but NOT user.manager_pin (plain text)
bug_fixes_verified.fix: Added check for user.manager_pin and user.owner_pin on admin/manager/owner users (lines 61-71)

bug_fixes_verified.issue: Phone verification doesn't update PO status on desktop
bug_fixes_verified.root_cause: Public verify endpoint did not set receipt_review_status field
bug_fixes_verified.fix: Added receipt_review_status bridge (lines 336-348) - sets 'reviewed' if PO has uploaded receipts

bug_fixes_verified.issue: mark-reviewed had its own PIN check, inconsistent with verify
bug_fixes_verified.fix: Now imports and uses _resolve_pin from verify module (lines 1155-1158)
Now imports and uses _resolve_pin from verify module (lines 651-655)

critical_code_review_comments: Unified _resolve_pin() correctly checks 4 PIN types in order: 1) system admin PIN (bcrypt), 2) manager_pin/owner_pin (plain), 3) TOTP, 4) auditor PIN
All verify endpoints (public and authenticated) now use the same _resolve_pin() function
mark-reviewed endpoints correctly import _resolve_pin from verify module
Public verify endpoint bridges to receipt_review_status when PO has receipts
Frontend ViewReceiptsPage correctly uses /api/verify/public/ endpoint (no auth needed)

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 passed, 1 skipped due to no test data)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified PIN verification is now working. The key fix was in _resolve_pin() which now checks both system_settings.admin_pin (bcrypt) AND user.manager_pin (plain text). All endpoints use this unified resolver. Phone verification via ViewReceiptsPage correctly calls /api/verify/public/ and also bridges to receipt_review_status so desktop shows the update.
